metadata.name: Lanthanum
metadata.title: Lanthanum Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing lanthanum laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Alessandro Moretti
author.title: Ph.D.
credentials: Assisted in EU Horizon 2020 laser additive projects, 2016-2019
author.imageAlt: Alessandro Moretti, Ph.D., Materials Engineer at Politecnico di Milano's Materials Dept., in research lab

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Lanthanum oxide removal without substrate damage

wavelength.description: Near-IR wavelength for optimal absorption in Lanthanum oxides

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for precise oxide removal control

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for continuous cleaning coverage

fluenceThreshold.description: Fluence threshold for effective Lanthanum cleaning

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for Lanthanum oxide ablation

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for efficient oxide layer removal

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for uniform cleaning efficiency

passCount.description: Recommended number of passes for complete oxide removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for uniform cleaning coverage
